creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Sun Mar 17 03:05:09 2013
New Revision: 314389
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/314389

Log:
  - Update to 0.4.0
  
  PR:		ports/176979
  Submitted by:	nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch> (maintainer)

Added:
  head/games/hitori/files/
  head/games/hitori/files/patch-src-interface.c   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/games/hitori/Makefile
  head/games/hitori/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/games/hitori/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/games/hitori/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/games/hitori/Makefile	Sat Mar 16 22:12:53 2013	(r314388)
+++ head/games/hitori/Makefile	Sun Mar 17 03:05:09 2013	(r314389)
@@ -1,10 +1,11 @@
-# Created by: nemysis@gmx.ch
+# Created by: nemysis <nemysis@gmx.ch>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	hitori
-PORTVERSION=	0.3.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.0
 CATEGORIES=	games
 MASTER_SITES=	GNOME
+DIST_SUBDIR=	gnome2
 
 MAINTAINER=	nemysis@gmx.ch
 COMMENT=	Logic game similar to Sudoku
@@ -15,7 +16,8 @@ LICENSE_NAME_CCbyNCSA3=	Attribution-NonC
 LICENSE_FILE_CCbyNCSA3=	${WRKSRC}/COPYING-DOCS
 LICENSE_PERMS_CCbyNCSA3=dist-mirror pkg-mirror auto-accept
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	xml2po:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gnome-doc-utils
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	xml2po:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gnome-doc-utils \
+		itstool:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/itstool
 LIB_DEPENDS=	cairo:${PORTSDIR}/graphics/cairo
 
 USE_XZ=		yes
@@ -27,6 +29,8 @@ INSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
 
 PORTDOCS=	AUTHORS ChangeLog MAINTAINERS NEWS README
 
+OPTIONS_DEFINE=	NLS
+
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MNLS}
@@ -44,7 +48,7 @@ post-patch:
 .endif
 
 post-install:
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/data/icons/48x48/${PORTNAME}.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png
+	${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/${PORTNAME}.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}

Modified: head/games/hitori/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/games/hitori/distinfo	Sat Mar 16 22:12:53 2013	(r314388)
+++ head/games/hitori/distinfo	Sun Mar 17 03:05:09 2013	(r314389)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (hitori-0.3.2.tar.xz) = 9e72bb0c84b0e0b66a96fcee6918cf15832f45458df4d8dd5f8091a20bba4350
-SIZE (hitori-0.3.2.tar.xz) = 457752
+SHA256 (gnome2/hitori-0.4.0.tar.xz) = 5d9e1c0f5d33c960167a126242bf57ff4865a6aaf6602da4a25aae56dc491030
+SIZE (gnome2/hitori-0.4.0.tar.xz) = 448052

Added: head/games/hitori/files/patch-src-interface.c
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/games/hitori/files/patch-src-interface.c	Sun Mar 17 03:05:09 2013	(r314389)
@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+--- src/interface.c.orig	2012-09-29 03:47:48.000000000 +0200
++++ src/interface.c	2012-11-02 15:11:34.000000000 +0100
+@@ -26,6 +26,7 @@
+ #include "main.h"
+ #include "interface.h"
+ #include "rules.h"
++#include <string.h>
+ 
+ #define NORMAL_FONT_SCALE 0.9
+ #define PAINTED_FONT_SCALE 0.6
